overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins under a covered pedestrian walkway, transitions across a busy intersection with a prominent hotel, continues along a sidewalk past distinctive red neon signage, and ends in an open plaza with elevated walkways and massive digital billboards.

events.description: approaching the end of covered walkway, bright sunlight becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the hotel building visible in the distance

entered.detail: concrete overhang structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large multi-story building with blue neon HOTEL signage
row of commercial storefronts with illuminated signs
illuminated advertising displays and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway with a distinctive green carpeted floor. Shop fronts line the right side with neon signage, while parked cars are visible through the open left side. The hotel building looms ahead at the end of the corridor, with bright daylight visible beyond the covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with hotel and pawn shop

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright open urban intersection
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered area and crossing the street toward the hotel building, navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic taxi driving along the street and stopping at the intersection

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall pole with red traffic signal illuminated
blue neon signage reading PAWN SHOP on the hotel building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into bright sunlight at a busy urban intersection. The hotel building with its prominent blue neon signage dominates the view across the street. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection, including a distinctive yellow taxi.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with neon signage and elevated transit

events.description: turning left onto the sidewalk along the main street
briefly passing behind a street lamp pole that partially blocks the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the distinctive neon-lit building with red lip signs, following the flow of pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead of ego along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building facade with large vertical red neon lip/kiss markings
futuristic elevated train or pedestrian walkway structure spanning the street
tall modern street lighting poles with orange accents

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character turns left and proceeds along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees. A distinctive building with large red neon lip signage dominates the right side of the frame. The elevated transit walkway becomes visible ahead, spanning across the street between futuristic glass towers while vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with elevated walkways and digital advertising towers

events.description: entering open plaza area from the dense sidewalk corridor
crowd density decreases significantly as the plaza opens up

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the massive digital billboard tower and elevated walkway system

entered.detail: spacious pedestrian plaza with tiled flooring and planters
massive vertical structure displaying large holographic advertisements
green public seating benches with people resting
multi-level elevated pedestrian walkways with escalators

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious urban plaza with paved tile flooring and scattered trees in planters. The dense crowd thins out as the space opens up. A massive digital billboard tower rises in the distance, displaying holographic advertisements, while an extensive elevated walkway system with escalators spans overhead. Benches line the left side where a few people sit and rest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins within a covered walkway featuring a green carpeted floor and neon shop fronts, moving forward until the character emerges from the shade into the bright sunlight of a busy intersection. As the character crosses the asphalt alongside pedestrians and futuristic taxis, the view is dominated by a hotel with prominent blue neon signage before the camera turns left onto a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and a building featuring large red neon lip signage. The scene then opens up as the character passes under an elevated transit walkway spanning glass towers, finally entering a spacious paved plaza. This open area expands to reveal a massive digital billboard tower with holographic advertisements and an extensive system of overhead escalators.
